subject: I made a website preview for Lola's Pub & Grub
body:
Hi,

I came across Lola's Pub & Grub in Cornwall and noticed you don't have a website yet. I went ahead and designed a quick 1-page preview concept for your restaurant business — with a hero section, services list, and contact form.

It's not live anywhere, just a concept to show what's possible. Want to see it?

— Mehdi
